testcase.name: test_atm_fsm
testcase.failure:
def test_atm_fsm(): this_dir = os.path.dirname(__file__) verilog_sources = [ os.path.join(this_dir, os.pardir, "atm_fsm.v") ]
> run( verilog_sources=verilog_sources, toplevel="atm_fsm", module="cocotb_tests.test_atm", sim_build="sim_build_cocotb", ) E SystemExit: FAILED 3 tests.
